title: UI Widget Factory
description: Implement an Abstract Factory 'UIFactory' with methods 'create_button()' and 'create_window()'. Implement two concrete factories: 'DarkFactory' and 'LightFactory' returning themed widgets with a 'render()' method.
test_script:
import unittest
from factory import DarkFactory, LightFactory
class TestFactory(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_themes(self):
        df = DarkFactory(); lf = LightFactory()
        self.assertIn('Dark', df.create_button().render())
        self.assertIn('Light', lf.create_button().render())
